evals.prompt: Optimize my CV. I want to reposition towards a Head of Engineering role.
evals.expected_output: Uploads or finds CV, runs positioning analysis, presents lens options, explores opportunities, generates targeted edits with trade-offs.

assertions.name: handles_cv
assertions.description: Uploads CV or finds existing version

assertions.name: generates_edits
assertions.description: Calls ceevee_confirm_lens to generate targeted edits

assertions.name: summarizes_edits
assertions.description: Presents edits as concise summaries with trade-offs, not raw response
